event: Coastal landscape with bay and sky
description: A neo-impressionist landscape painting depicting a calm coastal bay seen from an elevated vantage point. The foreground shows trees and vegetation in warm autumnal greens and oranges. The sea stretches across the middle distance in calm blue-gray tones. The sky fills the upper half of the composition with broad streaks of pink, mauve, and pale blue clouds. Distant blue hills or mountains line the far shore. The brushwork consists of small, regular dabs of color characteristic of the pointillist technique, creating a shimmering, luminous effect.
